description: IJENKO provides an IoT platform branded here as the IoE² API. Its published API is aimed at building end-user applications that work with accounts, devices, functionalities, places, programs, notifications, and related IoT resources.
summary: ijenko.net exposes one documented HTTP API surface: the IoE² IoT API for building end-user applications, authenticated with an IJENKO-issued token supplied either as the `Access-Token` header or `token` query parameter.

surfaces.name: IoE² IoT API - to create end-user applications
